nasb.text: And these they brought before the apostles; and after praying, they laid their hands on them.

esv.text: These they set before the apostles, and they prayed and laid their hands on them.

cnv.text: 叫他們站在使徒面前。使徒禱告後，就為他們按手。

ccb.text: 大家将这七个人带到使徒面前。使徒把手按在他们身上，为他们祷告。

csbs.text: 他们请这些人站在使徒们面前，使徒们就祷告，按手在他们身上。
